shared_case_surface: reviewed A2A summon child-return routes that keep summon request and result, SDK decision, Codex-local target, reviewed child result, checkpoint bridge, memo writeback candidate, runtime dry-run receipt contract, and routing re-entry visible on one bounded chain
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete case only if it preserves the same A2A summon return checkpoint question, keeps the request/result schemas, reviewed child result, checkpoint bridge, memo candidate, dry-run runtime contract, and routing re-entry inspectable, and still refuses hidden raw traces, live automation, memo canon promotion, or eval verdict promotion.
public_safe_requirements: the fixture contains no private raw traces or secret-bearing runtime logs
summon_request and summon_result remain schema-checkable against aoa-summon v3
the child result is explicitly reviewed before checkpoint bridge use
runtime receipt language keeps dry_run true and live_automation false
memo and eval outputs remain candidates rather than owner truth
